title: B.Ed Jobs 2026 – Clinical Psychologist, Special Educator and More Posts
org: Clinical Psychologist, Junior Audiologist & Speech Therapist, Occupational Therapist, Special Educator
shortInfo: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bathinda (AIIMS Bathinda) has released a recruitment notification for 4 posts including Clinical Psychologist - 1, Junior Audiologist & Speech Therapist - 1, Occupational Therapist - 1 and Special Educator - 1 for candidates with M.A./M.Sc. in Psychology, B.Sc. in Speech and Hearing, Bachelor’s Degree in Occupational Therapy, or B.Ed. in Special Education, and candidates can apply online from 07-05-2026 to 28-05-2026 at www.aiimsbathinda.edu.in.

basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bathinda Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Clinical Psychologist, Special Educator and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bathinda
basic_details.post_name: Clinical Psychologist, Junior Audiologist & Speech Therapist, Occupational Therapist, Special Educator
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bathinda (AIIMS Bathinda) has released a recruitment notification for 4 posts including Clinical Psychologist - 1, Junior Audiologist & Speech Therapist - 1, Occupational Therapist - 1 and Special Educator - 1 for candidates with M.A./M.Sc. in Psychology, B.Sc. in Speech and Hearing, Bachelor’s Degree in Occupational Therapy, or B.Ed. in Special Education, and candidates can apply online from 07-05-2026 to 28-05-2026 at www.aiimsbathinda.edu.in.

application_fee.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: +5 years, OBC: +3 years, Persons with Benchmark Disability: +10 years

age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the AIIMS Bathinda Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.education_qualification: M.A./M.Sc. in Psychology + M.Phil. in Clinical Psychology, B.Sc. Degree in Speech and Hearing, 10+2 in Science + Bachelor's Degree in Occupational Therapy, B.Ed. in Special Education or equivalent

vacancy_details.Post Name: Clinical Psychologist, Special Educator and More Posts

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Bathinda to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Bathinda Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for applying online is 28 May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available in AIIMS Bathinda Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for various posts in AIIMS Bathinda Recruitment 2026. These include positions like Clinical Psychologist, Junior Audiologist & Speech Therapist, Occupational Therapist, and Special Educator.

faq.question: What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all the posts is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: What is the application fee for AIIMS Bathinda Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee varies by category. General/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 1,180/-, SC/ST candidates need to pay Rs. 590/-, and Persons with Benchmark Disability (PwBD) candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for AIIMS Bathinda Recruitment 2026 will involve Document Verification followed by a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the positions.

faq.question: What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: Educational qualifications vary for each post. For example, Clinical Psychologist requires M.A./M.Sc. in Psychology + M.Phil. in Clinical Psychology, while Junior Audiologist & Speech Therapist requires a B.Sc. Degree in Speech and Hearing.

faq.question: Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for reserved categories. SC/ST candidates get a relaxation of +5 years, OBC candidates get +3 years, and Persons with Benchmark Disability candidates get +10 years.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered is as per the pay matrix. For Clinical Psychologist, it is L-10 + DA. For Junior Audiologist & Speech Therapist, Occupational Therapist, and Special Educator, it is L-6 + DA.

faq.question: What is the mode of application for AIIMS Bathinda Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official website or use the provided link to fill out and submit their application form before the last date.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification for AIIMS Bathinda Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section below. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
